audit_items.proof_trace: The pre-validation loop (L140-150) binds only `bytes32(reportData)` from unverified input and uses it exclusively for an allowlist membership read (`s_dataStreamsFeedIdToAsset`), with all other decoded fields syntactically discarded. Full economic data (price, timestamp) is consumed only from `verifiedReports` returned by `verifyBulk` (L153), which provides cryptographic integrity before any state mutation.
